falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below 3,800 (key support level from the 2022 bottom pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below this level would invalidate the bottom pattern match and suggest continued bearish momentum, contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 37) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme overbought conditions, suggesting a potential blowoff top rather than a bottom, directly contradicting the current pattern match and verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the Nasdaq 100 surges to 20% above its 50-day average while the index makes a new 200-day low
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination of weak price action and high volume would indicate a breakdown in support with broad market participation, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a deeper bearish trend.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
